# Local development server commands
local_start() {
    print_header "Starting Local Development Server"

    # Check if Docker is running
    if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        print_error "Docker is not running. Please start Docker Desktop first."
        return 1
    fi

    # Check if services are already running
    if docker-compose ps | grep -q "Up"; then
        print_warning "Services are already running"
        docker-compose ps
        return 0
    fi

    print_status "Building and starting services..."
    docker-compose up -d --build

    print_status "Waiting for services to be ready..."
    sleep 5

    # Check health
    local attempts=0
    local max_attempts=10

    while [ $attempts -lt $max_attempts ]; do
        if curl -f -s http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            print_success "✅ Local server started successfully!"
            echo ""
            echo -e "${CYAN}Local URLs:${NC}"
            echo "  Web:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_WEB_PORT"
            echo "  API:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health"
            echo "  Docs:   http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/openapi"
            echo ""
            print_status "View logs: $0 local:logs"
            return 0
        fi

        attempts=$((attempts + 1))
        sleep 2
    done

    print_error "Services started but not responding. Check logs with: $0 local:logs"
    docker-compose ps
    return 1
}

local_stop() {
    print_header "Stopping Local Development Server"

    if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "Up"; then
        print_warning "No services are running"
        return 0
    fi

    docker-compose stop
    print_success "Local services stopped"
}

local_restart() {
    print_header "Restarting Local Development Server"

    docker-compose restart

    print_success "Services restarted"
    sleep 3
    local_status
}

local_status() {
    print_header "Local Service Status"

    if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        print_error "Docker is not running"
        return 1
    fi

    docker-compose ps
}

local_logs() {
    local service="${1:-}"

    print_header "Local Logs${service:+: $service}"

    if [ -z "$service" ]; then
        docker-compose logs --tail=50 -f
    else
        docker-compose logs --tail=50 -f "$service"
    fi
}

local_clean() {
    print_header "Cleaning Local Environment"

    print_warning "This will remove all containers, volumes, and data"
    read -p "Are you sure? (y/N) " -n 1 -r
    echo

    if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
        docker-compose down -v
        print_success "Local environment cleaned"
    else
        print_status "Operation cancelled"
    fi
}

local_dev() {
    print_header "Starting Local Development Mode"
    print_status "API will run on http://localhost:8083"
    print_status "Web will run on http://localhost:5173 (Vite dev server)"
    print_status "Changes will auto-reload. Press Ctrl+C to stop."
    echo ""

    # Kill existing processes on these ports
    print_status "Cleaning up existing processes..."
    lsof -ti:8083 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
    lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true

    # Create logs directory
    mkdir -p logs

    # Create trap to cleanup on exit
    trap 'print_warning "Stopping dev servers..."; kill $(jobs -p) 2>/dev/null; exit' INT TERM

    # Start API in background with Air for hot-reload
    print_status "Starting Go API with hot-reload (Air)..."
    cd api
    if ! command -v air &> /dev/null; then
        print_warning "Air not found. Installing..."
        go install github.com/air-verse/air@latest
    fi

    # Create Air config if it doesn't exist
    if [ ! -f .air.toml ]; then
        print_status "Creating Air config..."
        cat > .air.toml << 'EOF'
root = "."
testdata_dir = "testdata"
tmp_dir = "tmp"

[build]
args_bin = []
bin = "./tmp/main"
cmd = "go build -o ./tmp/main ./cmd/api"
delay = 1000
exclude_dir = ["assets", "tmp", "vendor", "testdata"]
exclude_file = []
exclude_regex = ["_test.go"]
exclude_unchanged = false
follow_symlink = false
full_bin = ""
include_dir = []
include_ext = ["go", "tpl", "tmpl", "html"]
include_file = []
kill_delay = "0s"
log = "build-errors.log"
poll = false
poll_interval = 0
post_cmd = []
pre_cmd = []
rerun = false
rerun_delay = 500
send_interrupt = false
stop_on_error = false

[color]
app = ""
build = "yellow"
main = "magenta"
runner = "green"
watcher = "cyan"

[log]
main_only = false
time = false

[misc]
clean_on_exit = false

[screen]
clear_on_rebuild = false
keep_scroll = true
EOF
    fi

    export DB_PATH="../data/taskai.db"
    export PORT=8083
    air > ../logs/api.log 2>&1 &
    API_PID=$!
    cd ..

    # Wait a bit for API to start
    sleep 2

    # Start Web dev server in background
    print_status "Starting Vite dev server with hot-reload..."
    cd web
    export VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8083
    npm run dev > ../logs/web.log 2>&1 &
    WEB_PID=$!
    cd ..

    # Wait for servers to be ready
    sleep 3

    print_success "Development servers started!"
    echo ""
    print_success "✓ API: http://localhost:8083 (Go with Air hot-reload)"
    print_success "✓ Web: http://localhost:5173 (Vite hot-reload)"
    echo ""
    print_status "Logs:"
    print_status "  API: tail -f logs/api.log"
    print_status "  Web: tail -f logs/web.log"
    echo ""
    print_warning "Press Ctrl+C to stop both servers"
    echo ""

    # Tail both logs
    tail -f logs/api.log logs/web.log
}

# Main command handler
case ${1:-help} in
    local:start)
        local_start
        ;;
    local:stop)
        local_stop
        ;;
    local:restart)
        local_restart
        ;;
    local:status)
        local_status
        ;;
    local:logs)
        local_logs "$2"
        ;;
    local:clean)
        local_clean
        ;;
    deploy)
        shift
        deploy_to_staging "$*"
        ;;
    promote)
        promote_to_production "$2"
        ;;
    staging)
        case "$2" in
            status)
                env_status staging
                ;;
            logs)
                env_logs staging "$3"
                ;;
            health)
                env_health staging
                ;;
            restart)
                env_restart staging
                ;;
            stop)
                env_stop staging
                ;;
            start)
                env_start staging
                ;;
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create) admin_create "$4" "staging" ;;
                    list)   admin_list "staging" ;;
                    revoke) admin_revoke "$4" "staging" ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown staging command: $2"
                echo "Available: status, logs, health, restart, stop, start, admin"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    prod)
        case "$2" in
            status)
                env_status production
                ;;
            logs)
                env_logs production "$3"
                ;;
            health)
                env_health production
                ;;
            restart)
                env_restart production
                ;;
            stop)
                env_stop production
                ;;
            start)
                env_start production
                ;;
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create) admin_create "$4" "production" ;;
                    list)   admin_list "production" ;;
                    revoke) admin_revoke "$4" "production" ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown production command: $2"
                echo "Available: status, logs, health, restart, stop, start, admin"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    # Legacy shortcuts (default to staging for safety)
    restart)
        env_restart staging
        ;;
    stop)
        env_stop staging
        ;;
    start)
        env_start staging
        ;;
    status)
        env_status staging
        ;;
    logs)
        env_logs staging "$2"
        ;;
    health)
        env_health staging
        ;;
    test)
        run_all_tests
        ;;
    test-api)
        test_api
        ;;
    test-web)
        test_web
        ;;
    test-e2e)
        test_e2e
        ;;
    validate-openapi)
        validate_openapi
        ;;
    db-migrate)
        db_migrate "$2" "$3" "$4"
        ;;
    db-query)
        execute_db_query "$2"
        ;;
    admin)
        case "$2" in
            create)
                admin_create "$3" "remote"
                ;;
            list)
                admin_list "remote"
                ;;
            revoke)
                admin_revoke "$3" "remote"
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown admin command: $2"
                echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    local)
        case "$2" in
            dev)
                local_dev
                ;;
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create)
                        admin_create "$4" "local"
                        ;;
                    list)
                        admin_list "local"
                        ;;
                    revoke)
                        admin_revoke "$4" "local"
                        ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown local admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            users:list)
                users_list_all
                ;;
            users:password)
                users_reset_password "$3" "$4"
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown local command: $2"
                echo "Available: admin, users:list, users:password"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    remote)
        case "$2" in
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create)
                        admin_create "$4" "remote"
                        ;;
                    list)
                        admin_list "remote"
                        ;;
                    revoke)
                        admin_revoke "$4" "remote"
                        ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown remote admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown remote command: $2"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    help|--help|-h)
        show_help
        ;;
    *)
        print_error "Unknown command: $1"
        echo ""
        show_help
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

# Helper: get DB stats for an environment path
    _db_stats() {
        local env_path="$1"
        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$env_path' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
            for t in \$(sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \".tables\"); do
                c=\$(sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \$t;\")
                printf \"  %-25s %s rows\n\" \"\$t\" \"\$c\"
            done
            printf \"  %-25s %s\n\" \"DB size:\" \"\$(du -h /data/taskai.db | cut -f1)\"
        '" 2>/dev/null || echo "  (unable to read stats)"
    }

    # Show source DB stats
    print_status "Fetching source database info..."
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}Source database ($src_env):${NC}"
    _db_stats "$src_path"
    echo ""

    # Show destination DB stats
    print_status "Fetching destination database info..."
    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination database ($dst_env) — WILL BE DESTROYED:${NC}"
    _db_stats "$dst_path"
    echo ""

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/bin/bash

# TaskAI Server Management Script
# Manages deployment, testing, health checks, and operations

set -e

# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
PURPLE='\033[0;35m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Server connections
PROD_HOST="31.97.102.48"
STAGING_HOST="129.213.82.37"
REMOTE_USER="ubuntu"

# Staging environment (129.213.82.37)
STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH="/home/ubuntu/taskai-staging"
STAGING_DOMAIN="staging.taskai.cc"
STAGING_API_PORT=8082
STAGING_WEB_PORT=8086
STAGING_MCP_PORT=8084
STAGING_MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.staging.taskai.cc"

# Production environment (31.97.102.48)
PROD_DEPLOY_PATH="/home/ubuntu/taskai"
PROD_DOMAIN="taskai.cc"
PROD_API_PORT=8081
PROD_WEB_PORT=8085
PROD_MCP_PORT=8083
PROD_MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.taskai.cc"

# Local development settings
LOCAL_WEB_PORT=8084
LOCAL_API_PORT=8083

# Resolve environment — sets REMOTE_HOST, REMOTE_SERVER, REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH, etc.
resolve_env() {
    local env="${1:-staging}"
    case "$env" in
        prod|production)
            REMOTE_HOST="$PROD_HOST"
            REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
            REMOTE_DOMAIN="$PROD_DOMAIN"
            REMOTE_API_PORT="$PROD_API_PORT"
            REMOTE_WEB_PORT="$PROD_WEB_PORT"
            REMOTE_MCP_PORT="$PROD_MCP_PORT"
            REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN="$PROD_MCP_DOMAIN"
            ENV_LABEL="PRODUCTION"
            ;;
        staging|*)
            REMOTE_HOST="$STAGING_HOST"
            REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
            REMOTE_DOMAIN="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
            REMOTE_API_PORT="$STAGING_API_PORT"
            REMOTE_WEB_PORT="$STAGING_WEB_PORT"
            REMOTE_MCP_PORT="$STAGING_MCP_PORT"
            REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN="$STAGING_MCP_DOMAIN"
            ENV_LABEL="STAGING"
            ;;
    esac
    REMOTE_SERVER="${REMOTE_USER}@${REMOTE_HOST}"
}

# Function to print colored output
print_status() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"
}

print_warning() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARNING]${NC} $1"
}

print_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
}

print_success() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"
}

print_header() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}=== $1 ===${NC}"
}

# Function to show help
show_help() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}TaskAI Server Management Script${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo "Usage: $0 <command> [options]"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Local Development Commands:${NC}"
    echo "  local dev            Start local dev mode with hot-reload (API + Web)"
    echo "  local:start          Start local Docker services (http://localhost:$LOCAL_WEB_PORT)"
    echo "  local:stop           Stop local Docker services"
    echo "  local:restart        Restart local Docker services"
    echo "  local:status         Show local service status"
    echo "  local:logs [service] Show local logs"
    echo "  local:clean          Stop and remove all local containers/volumes"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Deployment Commands:${NC}"
    echo "  deploy [\"message\"]   Commit, push to main, auto-deploy to STAGING"
    echo "  promote [ref]        Promote to PRODUCTION (triggers GitHub Action)"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Staging Commands (staging.taskai.cc):${NC}"
    echo "  staging status       Show staging service status"
    echo "  staging logs [svc]   Show staging logs"
    echo "  staging health       Check staging health"
    echo "  staging restart      Restart staging services"
    echo "  staging admin create <email>  Grant admin on staging"
    echo "  staging admin list            List admins on staging"
    echo "  staging admin revoke <email>  Revoke admin on staging"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Production Commands (taskai.cc):${NC}"
    echo "  prod status          Show production service status"
    echo "  prod logs [svc]      Show production logs"
    echo "  prod health          Check production health"
    echo "  prod restart         Restart production services"
    echo "  prod admin create <email>    Grant admin on production"
    echo "  prod admin list              List admins on production"
    echo "  prod admin revoke <email>    Revoke admin on production"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Test Commands:${NC}"
    echo "  test                 Run all tests (backend + frontend + coverage)"
    echo "  test-api             Run Go API tests"
    echo "  test-web             Run frontend tests"
    echo "  test-e2e             Run Playwright E2E tests"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Admin Commands:${NC}"
    echo "  admin create <email> Create admin user (production)"
    echo "  admin list           List all admins (production)"
    echo "  admin revoke <email> Revoke admin privileges (production)"
    echo "  remote admin ...     Execute admin command on production"
    echo "  local admin ...      Execute admin command on local database"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Database Commands:${NC}"
    echo "  db-migrate <src> <dst> [--yes]  Copy database between environments (DESTRUCTIVE)"
    echo "  db-query <query>                Execute SQL on production database"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Utility Commands:${NC}"
    echo "  validate-openapi     Validate OpenAPI spec"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Examples:${NC}"
    echo "  $0 deploy \"feat: add dark mode\"       # Deploy to staging"
    echo "  $0 promote                             # Promote main to production"
    echo "  $0 promote abc123                      # Promote specific commit"
    echo "  $0 staging health                      # Check staging health"
    echo "  $0 prod health                         # Check production health"
    echo "  $0 staging logs api                    # View staging API logs"
    echo "  $0 db-migrate staging prod             # Copy staging DB to production"
    echo "  $0 db-migrate prod staging             # Copy production DB to staging"
}

# Deploy to staging (commit, push, GitHub Actions handles staging deploy)
deploy_to_staging() {
    local commit_message="${1:-Deploy: automated deployment}"

    print_header "Deploying to Staging"

    # Check for uncommitted changes
    if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
        print_status "Uncommitted changes detected, committing..."
        git add -A
        git commit -m "$commit_message

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>" || {
            print_error "Failed to commit changes"
            return 1
        }
    else
        print_status "No uncommitted changes found"
    fi

    # Push to remote
    print_status "Pushing to GitHub (triggers staging deploy)..."
    git push origin main || {
        print_error "Failed to push to GitHub"
        return 1
    }

    print_success "Code pushed to GitHub — staging deployment triggered"
    print_status "Monitor: https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/taskai/actions"
    echo ""

    # Wait and verify staging
    print_status "Waiting for staging deployment (60 seconds)..."
    sleep 60

    resolve_env staging
    print_status "Verifying staging deployment..."
    local max_attempts=20
    local attempt=1

    while [ $attempt -le $max_attempts ]; do
        if curl -f -s "https://$STAGING_DOMAIN/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            print_success "Staging deployment successful!"
            echo ""
            echo -e "${CYAN}Staging URL:${NC} https://$STAGING_DOMAIN"
            echo -e "${CYAN}API Health:${NC} https://$STAGING_DOMAIN/api/health"
            echo ""
            print_status "To promote to production: $0 promote"
            return 0
        fi

        print_status "Waiting for staging to be ready (attempt $attempt/$max_attempts)..."
        sleep 5
        attempt=$((attempt + 1))
    done

    print_warning "Staging not responding yet — deployment may still be in progress"
    print_status "Check status: $0 staging health"
    print_status "Check actions: https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/taskai/actions"
    return 1
}

# Promote to production (triggers GitHub Actions workflow)
promote_to_production() {
    local ref="${1:-main}"

    print_header "Promoting to Production"
    echo -e "${CYAN}Ref:${NC} $ref"
    echo ""

    # Check if gh CLI is available
    if ! command -v gh &> /dev/null; then
        print_error "GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed"
        print_status "Install: brew install gh"
        return 1
    fi

    # Trigger the production deployment workflow
    print_status "Triggering production deployment..."
    gh workflow run deploy-production.yml \
        -f ref="$ref" \
        -f confirm="deploy" || {
        print_error "Failed to trigger production deployment"
        return 1
    }

    print_success "Production deployment triggered!"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}Monitor:${NC} https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/taskai/actions"
    echo ""
    print_status "After deployment completes, verify: $0 prod health"
}

# Environment-specific operations
env_restart() {
    local env="$1"
    resolve_env "$env"
    print_header "Restarting $ENV_LABEL Services"

    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose restart"

    print_success "$ENV_LABEL services restarted"
    sleep 3
    env_status "$env"
}

env_stop() {
    local env="$1"
    resolve_env "$env"
    print_header "Stopping $ENV_LABEL Services"

    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose stop"

    print_success "$ENV_LABEL services stopped"
}

env_start() {
    local env="$1"
    resolve_env "$env"
    print_header "Starting $ENV_LABEL Services"

    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose up -d"

    print_success "$ENV_LABEL services started"
    sleep 3
    env_status "$env"
}

env_status() {
    local env="$1"
    resolve_env "$env"
    print_header "$ENV_LABEL Service Status"

    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose ps"
}

env_logs() {
    local env="$1"
    local service="${2:-}"
    resolve_env "$env"

    print_header "$ENV_LABEL Logs${service:+: $service}"

    if [ -z "$service" ]; then
        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose logs --tail=50"
    else
        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose logs --tail=50 $service"
    fi
}

env_health() {
    local env="$1"
    resolve_env "$env"
    print_header "$ENV_LABEL Health Check"

    # Check API
    print_status "Checking API health..."
    if curl -f -s "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health" | jq . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ API${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health)"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}✗ API${NC} - Not responding"
    fi

    # Check web
    print_status "Checking web UI..."
    if curl -f -s -I "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/" | head -1 | grep -q "200\|301\|302"; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Web UI${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/)"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}✗ Web UI${NC} - Not responding"
    fi

    # Check MCP
    print_status "Checking MCP server..."
    if curl -f -s "https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health" | grep -q "ok"; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ MCP${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health)"
    else
        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ MCP${NC} - Not responding (https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health)"
    fi

    # Check SonarQube (production only)
    if [ "$env" = "production" ]; then
        print_status "Checking SonarQube..."
        if curl -f -s "https://sonar.taskai.cc/api/system/status" | grep -q '"UP"'; then
            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ SonarQube${NC} - Healthy (https://sonar.taskai.cc)"
        else
            echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ SonarQube${NC} - Not responding (https://sonar.taskai.cc)"
        fi
    fi

    # Check database via SSH
    print_status "Checking database..."
    if ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'wget -q -O- http://localhost:8080/api/health'" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "ok"; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Database${NC} - Accessible from API"
    else
        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Database${NC} - Unable to verify"
    fi
}

# Run API tests
test_api() {
    print_header "Running API Tests"

    cd api
    go test -v -cover ./... | tee /tmp/taskai-api-test.log
    local exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
    cd ..

    if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
        print_success "API tests passed"
    else
        print_error "API tests failed"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Run frontend tests
test_web() {
    print_header "Running Frontend Tests"

    cd web
    npm test 2>&1 | tee /tmp/taskai-web-test.log || {
        print_warning "Frontend tests not configured or failed"
        cd ..
        return 0
    }
    cd ..

    print_success "Frontend tests passed"
}

# Run E2E tests
test_e2e() {
    print_header "Running Playwright E2E Tests"

    cd web
    npx playwright test 2>&1 | tee /tmp/taskai-e2e-test.log
    local exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
    cd ..

    if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
        print_success "E2E tests passed"
    else
        print_error "E2E tests failed"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Run all tests and show summary
run_all_tests() {
    print_header "Running All Tests"

    local api_result=0
    local web_result=0
    local e2e_result=0

    # Run API tests
    test_api || api_result=1
    echo ""

    # Run web tests
    test_web || web_result=1
    echo ""

    # Run E2E tests
    test_e2e || e2e_result=1
    echo ""

    # Show coverage
    print_header "Test Coverage"

    if [ -f /tmp/taskai-api-test.log ]; then
        echo -e "${CYAN}API Coverage:${NC}"
        grep "coverage:" /tmp/taskai-api-test.log | tail -1 || echo "  No coverage data"
    fi

    # Summary
    print_header "Test Summary"

    if [ $api_result -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✅ API Tests${NC} - Passed"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}❌ API Tests${NC} - Failed"
    fi

    if [ $web_result -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✅ Frontend Tests${NC} - Passed"
    else
        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠️  Frontend Tests${NC} - Skipped or Failed"
    fi

    if [ $e2e_result -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}✅ E2E Tests${NC} - Passed"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}❌ E2E Tests${NC} - Failed"
    fi

    if [ $api_result -eq 0 ] && [ $e2e_result -eq 0 ]; then
        echo ""
        print_success "✅ All critical tests passed!"
        return 0
    else
        echo ""
        print_error "❌ Some tests failed"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Validate OpenAPI spec
validate_openapi() {
    print_header "Validating OpenAPI Specification"

    if ! command -v openapi-generator-cli >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        print_warning "openapi-generator-cli not found, using simple validation"

        if [ -f api/openapi.yaml ]; then
            if grep -q "openapi: 3" api/openapi.yaml; then
                print_success "OpenAPI spec appears valid"
            else
                print_error "OpenAPI spec may be invalid"
                return 1
            fi
        else
            print_error "OpenAPI spec not found at api/openapi.yaml"
            return 1
        fi
    else
        openapi-generator-cli validate -i api/openapi.yaml
    fi
}

# Migrate database between environments
# Usage: db_migrate <src> <dst> [--yes]
db_migrate() {
    local src_env="$1"
    local dst_env="$2"
    local force="$3"

    # Normalize env names
    case "$src_env" in
        staging)  src_env="staging" ;;
        prod|production) src_env="production" ;;
        *)
            print_error "Invalid source environment: $src_env"
            echo "Valid environments: staging, prod"
            return 1
            ;;
    esac

    case "$dst_env" in
        staging)  dst_env="staging" ;;
        prod|production) dst_env="production" ;;
        *)
            print_error "Invalid destination environment: $dst_env"
            echo "Valid environments: staging, prod"
            return 1
            ;;
    esac

    if [ "$src_env" = "$dst_env" ]; then
        print_error "Source and destination cannot be the same environment"
        return 1
    fi

    # Resolve paths and hosts for both environments
    local src_path src_domain src_host dst_path dst_domain dst_host
    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
        src_path="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
        src_domain="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
        src_host="$STAGING_HOST"
    else
        src_path="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
        src_domain="$PROD_DOMAIN"
        src_host="$PROD_HOST"
    fi

    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
        dst_path="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
        dst_domain="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
        dst_host="$STAGING_HOST"
    else
        dst_path="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
        dst_domain="$PROD_DOMAIN"
        dst_host="$PROD_HOST"
    fi

    local src_server="${REMOTE_USER}@${src_host}"
    local dst_server="${REMOTE_USER}@${dst_host}"

    print_header "Database Migration"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}Source:${NC}      $src_env ($src_domain)"
    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination:${NC} $dst_env ($dst_domain)"
    echo ""

    # Helper: get DB stats for an environment path
    _db_stats() {
        local env_path="$1"
        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$env_path' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
            for t in \$(sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \".tables\"); do
                c=\$(sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \$t;\")
                printf \"  %-25s %s rows\n\" \"\$t\" \"\$c\"
            done
            printf \"  %-25s %s\n\" \"DB size:\" \"\$(du -h /data/taskai.db | cut -f1)\"
        '" 2>/dev/null || echo "  (unable to read stats)"
    }

    # Show source DB stats
    print_status "Fetching source database info..."
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}Source database ($src_env):${NC}"
    _db_stats "$src_path"
    echo ""

    # Show destination DB stats
    print_status "Fetching destination database info..."
    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination database ($dst_env) — WILL BE DESTROYED:${NC}"
    _db_stats "$dst_path"
    echo ""

    # Warning
    echo -e "${RED}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}║  ⚠️  WARNING: THIS WILL DESTROY THE $dst_env DATABASE  ${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}║                                                              ║${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}║  The $dst_env database at $dst_domain will be${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}║  completely replaced with a copy from $src_env.${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}║                                                              ║${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}║  This action CANNOT be undone.                               ║${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
    echo ""

    if [ "$force" = "--yes" ]; then
        print_warning "Running in silent mode (--yes) — skipping confirmations"
    else
        # First confirmation
        read -p "Type the destination environment name to confirm ($dst_env): " confirm_env
        if [ "$confirm_env" != "$dst_env" ]; then
            print_status "Migration cancelled"
            return 0
        fi

        # Second confirmation for production
        if [ "$dst_env" = "production" ]; then
            echo ""
            echo -e "${RED}You are about to overwrite the PRODUCTION database!${NC}"
            read -p "Type 'yes-destroy-production' to proceed: " confirm_prod
            if [ "$confirm_prod" != "yes-destroy-production" ]; then
                print_status "Migration cancelled"
                return 0
            fi
        fi
    fi

    echo ""
    print_status "Starting database migration..."

    # Step 1: Create backup of destination database
    print_status "Step 1/5: Backing up destination database..."
    local backup_ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'cp /data/taskai.db /data/taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts}'" || {
        print_error "Failed to backup destination database"
        return 1
    }
    print_success "Backup saved as taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts}"

    # Step 2: Export source database to host (checkpoint WAL first for clean copy)
    print_status "Step 2/5: Exporting source database..."
    local src_app_name
    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
        src_app_name="taskai-staging"
    else
        src_app_name="taskai"
    fi
    local src_dir_name
    src_dir_name=$(basename "$src_path")
    local src_volume="${src_dir_name}_${src_app_name}-data"

    # Checkpoint WAL to ensure all data is in the main DB file, then copy
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
        cd '$src_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c '
            if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\" >/dev/null 2>&1
            fi
        '
        docker run --rm \
            -v '${src_volume}:/data' \
            -v /tmp:/tmp \
            alpine sh -c 'cp /data/taskai.db /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db'
    " || {
        print_error "Failed to export source database"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 3: Stop destination API to prevent writes
    print_status "Step 3/5: Stopping destination API..."
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose stop api" || {
        print_error "Failed to stop destination API"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 4: Import into destination via the Docker volume
    print_status "Step 4/5: Importing database into destination..."
    local dst_dir_name
    dst_dir_name=$(basename "$dst_path")
    # Docker Compose volume name = <project>_<volume> where project = directory name
    # and volume name = <app_name>-data from docker-compose.yml
    local dst_app_name
    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
        dst_app_name="taskai-staging"
    else
        dst_app_name="taskai"
    fi
    local dst_volume="${dst_dir_name}_${dst_app_name}-data"

    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
        docker run --rm \
            -v '${dst_volume}:/data' \
            -v /tmp:/tmp \
            alpine sh -c '
                cp /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db /data/taskai.db
                rm -f /data/taskai.db-wal /data/taskai.db-shm
                chmod 666 /data/taskai.db
            '
    " || {
        print_error "Failed to import database. Restarting destination..."
        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose start api"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 5: Restart destination services
    print_status "Step 5/5: Restarting destination services..."
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose up -d" || {
        print_error "Failed to restart destination services"
        return 1
    }

    # Clean up temp file
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "rm -f /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true

    # Wait and verify health
    print_status "Waiting for services to be healthy..."
    sleep 10

    resolve_env "$dst_env"
    local healthy=false
    for i in $(seq 1 20); do
        if curl -skf "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            healthy=true
            break
        fi
        sleep 3
    done

    if [ "$healthy" = true ]; then
        echo ""
        print_success "Database migration completed successfully!"
        echo ""
        echo -e "${CYAN}Source:${NC}      $src_env ($src_domain)"
        echo -e "${CYAN}Destination:${NC} $dst_env ($dst_domain) — now has source data"
        echo -e "${CYAN}Backup:${NC}     taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts} (inside destination container)"
        echo ""
        print_status "To restore the backup if needed:"
        echo "  ssh $REMOTE_SERVER"
        echo "  cd $dst_path"
        echo "  docker compose exec api sh -c 'cp /data/taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts} /data/taskai.db'"
        echo "  docker compose restart api"
    else
        print_error "Migration completed but destination health check failed"
        print_status "Check logs: $0 $( [ '$dst_env' = 'staging' ] && echo 'staging' || echo 'prod' ) logs api"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Execute database query on production
execute_db_query() {
    local query="$1"

    if [ -z "$query" ]; then
        print_error "Usage: $0 db-query \"SQL_QUERY\""
        return 1
    fi

    resolve_env production
    print_header "Production Database Query"
    echo -e "${CYAN}Server:${NC} $REMOTE_SERVER"
    echo -e "${CYAN}Query:${NC} $query"
    echo ""

    # Verify SSH connectivity
    if ! ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 "$REMOTE_SERVER" "echo ok" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        print_error "Cannot connect to $REMOTE_SERVER"
        return 1
    fi

    # Execute query via docker exec as root (to install sqlite3 if needed)
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
        if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
        fi
        sqlite3 -header -column /data/taskai.db \"$query\"
    '"
}

# Admin management - create admin user
# Usage: admin_create <email> <env>
# env: staging, prod/production, local
admin_create() {
    local email="$1"
    local env="${2:-staging}"

    if [ -z "$email" ]; then
        print_error "Usage: $0 [staging|prod] admin create <email>"
        return 1
    fi

    case "$env" in
        staging|prod|production)
            resolve_env "$env"
            print_header "Granting Admin Privileges"
            echo -e "${CYAN}Email:${NC} $email"
            echo -e "${CYAN}Environment:${NC} $ENV_LABEL ($REMOTE_DOMAIN)"
            echo ""

            local result=$(ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
                if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
                fi
                sqlite3 -header -column /data/taskai.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 1 WHERE email = '\''$email'\''; SELECT id, email, is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '\''$email'\''\"
            '")
            echo "$result"

            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then
                echo ""
                print_success "Admin privileges granted to $email on $ENV_LABEL"
            else
                echo ""
                print_error "User $email not found in $ENV_LABEL database. Create the user account first."
                return 1
            fi
            ;;
        local)
            print_header "Granting Admin Privileges (Local)"
            echo -e "${CYAN}Email:${NC} $email"
            echo ""

            if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "api.*Up"; then
                print_error "Local API container is not running. Start with: $0 local:start"
                return 1
            fi

            local result=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
                if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
                fi
                sqlite3 -header -column /data/taskai.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 1 WHERE email = '$email'; SELECT id, email, is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
            ")
            echo "$result"

            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then
                echo ""
                print_success "Admin privileges granted to $email (local)"
            else
                echo ""
                print_error "User $email not found in local database. Create the user account first."
                return 1
            fi
            ;;
        *)
            print_error "Invalid environment: $env"
            echo "Valid: staging, prod, local"
            return 1
            ;;
    esac
}

                fi
                sqlite3 -header -column /data/taskai.db \"$query\"
            '"
            ;;
        local)
            print_header "Admin Users — Local"
            echo ""

            if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "api.*Up"; then
                print_error "Local API container is not running. Start with: $0 local:start"
                return 1
            fi

            docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "

            "
            ;;
        *)
            print_error "Invalid environment: $env"

            return 1
            ;;
    esac
}

# Reset user password (local only, for debugging)
users_reset_password() {
    local email="$1"
    local new_password="${2:-password123}"

    print_header "Reset User Password (LOCAL ONLY - DEBUG)"
    print_warning "⚠️  This command only works in LOCAL environment for debugging"
    echo ""

    if [ -z "$email" ]; then
        print_error "Usage: $0 local users:password <email> [password]"
        echo "Example: $0 local users:password a@b.me MyNewPass123"
        echo ""
        echo "If password is not provided, defaults to: password123"
        return 1
    fi

    if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "api.*Up"; then
        print_error "Local API container is not running. Start with: $0 local:start"
        return 1
    fi

    print_status "Resetting password for: $email"
    print_status "New password: $new_password"
    echo ""

    # First, check if user exists
    local user_exists=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
        sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
    " | tr -d '\r')

    if [ -z "$user_exists" ]; then
        print_error "User $email not found in database"
        return 1
    fi

    # Get user admin status
    local is_admin=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
        sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"SELECT is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
    " | tr -d '\r')

    print_warning "This will DELETE the user and recreate with new password"
    echo "User ID: $user_exists"
    echo "Admin status: $is_admin"
    echo ""

    # Delete user
    docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
        sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"DELETE FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
    "

    # Recreate via API (which will hash the password)
    local signup_response=$(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/auth/signup" \
        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
        -d "{\"email\":\"$email\",\"password\":\"$new_password\"}")

    local new_token=$(echo "$signup_response" | python3 -c "import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('token', ''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

    if [ -n "$new_token" ]; then
        # Restore admin status if needed
        if [ "$is_admin" = "1" ]; then
            docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
                sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 1 WHERE email = '$email';\"
            "
            print_status "Restored admin privileges"
        fi

        echo ""
        print_success "Password reset successfully!"
        echo ""
        echo -e "${CYAN}Login credentials:${NC}"
        echo "  Email: $email"
        echo "  Password: $new_password"
    else
        print_error "Failed to reset password"
        echo "Response: $signup_response"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Admin management - revoke admin
# Usage: admin_revoke <email> <env>
admin_revoke() {
    local email="$1"

    if [ -z "$email" ]; then
        print_error "Usage: $0 [staging|prod] admin revoke <email>"

            local result=$(ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
                if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
                fi
                sqlite3 -header -column /data/taskai.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 0 WHERE email = '\''$email'\''; SELECT id, email, is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '\''$email'\''\"
            '")
            echo "$result"

            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then
                echo ""
                print_success "Admin privileges revoked from $email on $ENV_LABEL"
            else
                echo ""
                print_error "User $email not found in $ENV_LABEL database"
                return 1
            fi
            ;;
        local)
            print_header "Revoking Admin Privileges (Local)"
            echo -e "${CYAN}Email:${NC} $email"
            echo ""

            if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "api.*Up"; then
                print_error "Local API container is not running. Start with: $0 local:start"
                return 1
            fi

            local result=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
                if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
                fi
                sqlite3 -header -column /data/taskai.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 0 WHERE email = '$email'; SELECT id, email, is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
            ")
            echo "$result"

            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then
                echo ""
                print_success "Admin privileges revoked from $email (local)"
            else
                echo ""
                print_error "User $email not found in local database"
                return 1
            fi
            ;;
        *)
            print_error "Invalid environment: $env"
            echo "Valid: staging, prod, local"
            return 1
            ;;
    esac
}

# Local development server commands
local_start() {
    print_header "Starting Local Development Server"

    # Check if Docker is running
    if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        print_error "Docker is not running. Please start Docker Desktop first."
        return 1
    fi

    # Check if services are already running
    if docker-compose ps | grep -q "Up"; then
        print_warning "Services are already running"
        docker-compose ps
        return 0
    fi

    print_status "Building and starting services..."
    docker-compose up -d --build

    print_status "Waiting for services to be ready..."
    sleep 5

    # Check health
    local attempts=0
    local max_attempts=10

    while [ $attempts -lt $max_attempts ]; do
        if curl -f -s http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            print_success "✅ Local server started successfully!"
            echo ""
            echo -e "${CYAN}Local URLs:${NC}"
            echo "  Web:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_WEB_PORT"
            echo "  API:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health"
            echo "  Docs:   http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/openapi"
            echo ""
            print_status "View logs: $0 local:logs"
            return 0
        fi

        attempts=$((attempts + 1))
        sleep 2
    done

    print_error "Services started but not responding. Check logs with: $0 local:logs"
    docker-compose ps
    return 1
}

local_stop() {
    print_header "Stopping Local Development Server"

    if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "Up"; then
        print_warning "No services are running"
        return 0
    fi

    docker-compose stop
    print_success "Local services stopped"
}

local_restart() {
    print_header "Restarting Local Development Server"

    docker-compose restart

    print_success "Services restarted"
    sleep 3
    local_status
}

local_status() {
    print_header "Local Service Status"

    if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        print_error "Docker is not running"
        return 1
    fi

    docker-compose ps
}

local_logs() {
    local service="${1:-}"

    print_header "Local Logs${service:+: $service}"

    if [ -z "$service" ]; then
        docker-compose logs --tail=50 -f
    else
        docker-compose logs --tail=50 -f "$service"
    fi
}

local_clean() {
    print_header "Cleaning Local Environment"

    print_warning "This will remove all containers, volumes, and data"
    read -p "Are you sure? (y/N) " -n 1 -r
    echo

    if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
        docker-compose down -v
        print_success "Local environment cleaned"
    else
        print_status "Operation cancelled"
    fi
}

local_dev() {
    print_header "Starting Local Development Mode"
    print_status "API will run on http://localhost:8083"
    print_status "Web will run on http://localhost:5173 (Vite dev server)"
    print_status "Changes will auto-reload. Press Ctrl+C to stop."
    echo ""

    # Kill existing processes on these ports
    print_status "Cleaning up existing processes..."
    lsof -ti:8083 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
    lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true

    # Create logs directory
    mkdir -p logs

    # Create trap to cleanup on exit
    trap 'print_warning "Stopping dev servers..."; kill $(jobs -p) 2>/dev/null; exit' INT TERM

    # Start API in background with Air for hot-reload
    print_status "Starting Go API with hot-reload (Air)..."
    cd api
    if ! command -v air &> /dev/null; then
        print_warning "Air not found. Installing..."
        go install github.com/air-verse/air@latest
    fi

    # Create Air config if it doesn't exist
    if [ ! -f .air.toml ]; then
        print_status "Creating Air config..."
        cat > .air.toml << 'EOF'
root = "."
testdata_dir = "testdata"
tmp_dir = "tmp"

[build]
args_bin = []
bin = "./tmp/main"
cmd = "go build -o ./tmp/main ./cmd/api"
delay = 1000
exclude_dir = ["assets", "tmp", "vendor", "testdata"]
exclude_file = []
exclude_regex = ["_test.go"]
exclude_unchanged = false
follow_symlink = false
full_bin = ""
include_dir = []
include_ext = ["go", "tpl", "tmpl", "html"]
include_file = []
kill_delay = "0s"
log = "build-errors.log"
poll = false
poll_interval = 0
post_cmd = []
pre_cmd = []
rerun = false
rerun_delay = 500
send_interrupt = false
stop_on_error = false

[color]
app = ""
build = "yellow"
main = "magenta"
runner = "green"
watcher = "cyan"

[log]
main_only = false
time = false

[misc]
clean_on_exit = false

[screen]
clear_on_rebuild = false
keep_scroll = true
EOF
    fi

    export DB_PATH="../data/taskai.db"
    export PORT=8083
    air > ../logs/api.log 2>&1 &
    API_PID=$!
    cd ..

    # Wait a bit for API to start
    sleep 2

    # Start Web dev server in background
    print_status "Starting Vite dev server with hot-reload..."
    cd web
    export VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8083
    npm run dev > ../logs/web.log 2>&1 &
    WEB_PID=$!
    cd ..

    # Wait for servers to be ready
    sleep 3

    print_success "Development servers started!"
    echo ""
    print_success "✓ API: http://localhost:8083 (Go with Air hot-reload)"
    print_success "✓ Web: http://localhost:5173 (Vite hot-reload)"
    echo ""
    print_status "Logs:"
    print_status "  API: tail -f logs/api.log"
    print_status "  Web: tail -f logs/web.log"
    echo ""
    print_warning "Press Ctrl+C to stop both servers"
    echo ""

    # Tail both logs
    tail -f logs/api.log logs/web.log
}

# Main command handler
case ${1:-help} in
    local:start)
        local_start
        ;;
    local:stop)
        local_stop
        ;;
    local:restart)
        local_restart
        ;;
    local:status)
        local_status
        ;;
    local:logs)
        local_logs "$2"
        ;;
    local:clean)
        local_clean
        ;;
    deploy)
        shift
        deploy_to_staging "$*"
        ;;
    promote)
        promote_to_production "$2"
        ;;
    staging)
        case "$2" in
            status)
                env_status staging
                ;;
            logs)
                env_logs staging "$3"
                ;;
            health)
                env_health staging
                ;;
            restart)
                env_restart staging
                ;;
            stop)
                env_stop staging
                ;;
            start)
                env_start staging
                ;;
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create) admin_create "$4" "staging" ;;
                    list)   admin_list "staging" ;;
                    revoke) admin_revoke "$4" "staging" ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown staging command: $2"
                echo "Available: status, logs, health, restart, stop, start, admin"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    prod)
        case "$2" in
            status)
                env_status production
                ;;
            logs)
                env_logs production "$3"
                ;;
            health)
                env_health production
                ;;
            restart)
                env_restart production
                ;;
            stop)
                env_stop production
                ;;
            start)
                env_start production
                ;;
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create) admin_create "$4" "production" ;;
                    list)   admin_list "production" ;;
                    revoke) admin_revoke "$4" "production" ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown production command: $2"
                echo "Available: status, logs, health, restart, stop, start, admin"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    # Legacy shortcuts (default to staging for safety)
    restart)
        env_restart staging
        ;;
    stop)
        env_stop staging
        ;;
    start)
        env_start staging
        ;;
    status)
        env_status staging
        ;;
    logs)
        env_logs staging "$2"
        ;;
    health)
        env_health staging
        ;;
    test)
        run_all_tests
        ;;
    test-api)
        test_api
        ;;
    test-web)
        test_web
        ;;
    test-e2e)
        test_e2e
        ;;
    validate-openapi)
        validate_openapi
        ;;
    db-migrate)
        db_migrate "$2" "$3" "$4"
        ;;
    db-query)
        execute_db_query "$2"
        ;;
    admin)
        case "$2" in
            create)
                admin_create "$3" "remote"
                ;;
            list)
                admin_list "remote"
                ;;
            revoke)
                admin_revoke "$3" "remote"
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown admin command: $2"
                echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    local)
        case "$2" in
            dev)
                local_dev
                ;;
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create)
                        admin_create "$4" "local"
                        ;;
                    list)
                        admin_list "local"
                        ;;
                    revoke)
                        admin_revoke "$4" "local"
                        ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown local admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            users:list)
                users_list_all
                ;;
            users:password)
                users_reset_password "$3" "$4"
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown local command: $2"
                echo "Available: admin, users:list, users:password"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    remote)
        case "$2" in
            admin)
                case "$3" in
                    create)
                        admin_create "$4" "remote"
                        ;;
                    list)
                        admin_list "remote"
                        ;;
                    revoke)
                        admin_revoke "$4" "remote"
                        ;;
                    *)
                        print_error "Unknown remote admin command: $3"
                        echo "Available: create <email>, list, revoke <email>"
                        exit 1
                        ;;
                esac
                ;;
            *)
                print_error "Unknown remote command: $2"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
        ;;
    help|--help|-h)
        show_help
        ;;
    *)
        print_error "Unknown command: $1"
        echo ""
        show_help
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

input.old_string:
# Step 1: Create backup of destination database
    print_status "Step 1/5: Backing up destination database..."
    local backup_ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'cp /data/taskai.db /data/taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts}'" || {
        print_error "Failed to backup destination database"
        return 1
    }
    print_success "Backup saved as taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts}"

    # Step 2: Export source database to host (checkpoint WAL first for clean copy)
    print_status "Step 2/5: Exporting source database..."
    local src_app_name
    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
        src_app_name="taskai-staging"
    else
        src_app_name="taskai"
    fi
    local src_dir_name
    src_dir_name=$(basename "$src_path")
    local src_volume="${src_dir_name}_${src_app_name}-data"

    # Checkpoint WAL to ensure all data is in the main DB file, then copy
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
        cd '$src_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c '
            if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\" >/dev/null 2>&1
            fi
        '
        docker run --rm \
            -v '${src_volume}:/data' \
            -v /tmp:/tmp \
            alpine sh -c 'cp /data/taskai.db /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db'
    " || {
        print_error "Failed to export source database"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 3: Stop destination API to prevent writes
    print_status "Step 3/5: Stopping destination API..."
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose stop api" || {
        print_error "Failed to stop destination API"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 4: Import into destination via the Docker volume
    print_status "Step 4/5: Importing database into destination..."
    local dst_dir_name
    dst_dir_name=$(basename "$dst_path")
    # Docker Compose volume name = <project>_<volume> where project = directory name
    # and volume name = <app_name>-data from docker-compose.yml
    local dst_app_name
    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
        dst_app_name="taskai-staging"
    else
        dst_app_name="taskai"
    fi
    local dst_volume="${dst_dir_name}_${dst_app_name}-data"

    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
        docker run --rm \
            -v '${dst_volume}:/data' \
            -v /tmp:/tmp \
            alpine sh -c '
                cp /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db /data/taskai.db
                rm -f /data/taskai.db-wal /data/taskai.db-shm
                chmod 666 /data/taskai.db
            '
    " || {
        print_error "Failed to import database. Restarting destination..."
        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose start api"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 5: Restart destination services
    print_status "Step 5/5: Restarting destination services..."
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose up -d" || {
        print_error "Failed to restart destination services"
        return 1
    }

    # Clean up temp file
    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "rm -f /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true
input.new_string:
# Step 1: Create backup of destination database
    print_status "Step 1/5: Backing up destination database..."
    local backup_ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
    ssh "$dst_server" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'cp /data/taskai.db /data/taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts}'" || {
        print_error "Failed to backup destination database"
        return 1
    }
    print_success "Backup saved as taskai.db.backup_${backup_ts}"

    # Step 2: Export source database (checkpoint WAL first for clean copy)
    print_status "Step 2/5: Exporting source database..."
    ssh "$src_server" "
        cd '$src_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c '
            if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                sqlite3 /data/taskai.db \"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\" >/dev/null 2>&1
            fi
        '
        cd '$src_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'cat /data/taskai.db' > /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db
    " || {
        print_error "Failed to export source database"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 3: Transfer database between servers (via local machine)
    print_status "Step 3/5: Transferring database..."
    local local_tmp="/tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db"
    scp "$src_server:/tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" "$local_tmp" || {
        print_error "Failed to download source database"
        return 1
    }
    scp "$local_tmp" "$dst_server:/tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" || {
        print_error "Failed to upload database to destination"
        rm -f "$local_tmp"
        return 1
    }
    rm -f "$local_tmp"
    # Clean up source temp file
    ssh "$src_server" "rm -f /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true

    # Step 4: Stop destination API and import
    print_status "Step 4/5: Stopping destination API and importing..."
    ssh "$dst_server" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose stop api" || {
        print_error "Failed to stop destination API"
        return 1
    }

    # Copy into the Docker volume via a temp container
    local dst_dir_name
    dst_dir_name=$(basename "$dst_path")
    local dst_volume_name
    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
        dst_volume_name="${dst_dir_name}_taskai-staging-data"
    else
        dst_volume_name="${dst_dir_name}_prod-data"
    fi

    ssh "$dst_server" "
        docker run --rm \
            -v '${dst_volume_name}:/data' \
            -v /tmp:/tmp \
            alpine sh -c '
                cp /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db /data/taskai.db
                rm -f /data/taskai.db-wal /data/taskai.db-shm
                chmod 666 /data/taskai.db
            '
    " || {
        print_error "Failed to import database. Restarting destination..."
        ssh "$dst_server" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose start api"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 5: Restart destination services
    print_status "Step 5/5: Restarting destination services..."
    ssh "$dst_server" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose up -d" || {
        print_error "Failed to restart destination services"
        return 1
    }

    # Clean up temp files
    ssh "$dst_server" "rm -f /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true

        print_error "Failed to import database. Restarting destination..."
        ssh "$dst_server" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose start api"
        return 1
    }

    # Step 5: Restart destination services
    print_status "Step 5/5: Restarting destination services..."
    ssh "$dst_server" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose up -d" || {
        print_error "Failed to restart destination services"
        return 1
    }

    # Clean up temp files
    ssh "$dst_server" "rm -f /tmp/taskai_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true
